observation_intake_references.description: Read-only observation fixture derived from public PP&D DevHub guidance labels only.

redaction_coverage_checks.notes: No account identifiers, private values, document names, or user-entered values are retained.

private_value_omission_evidence.replacement_policy: Use stable synthetic labels in committed fixtures.

route_pattern_normalization_checks.raw_route_policy: No raw authenticated route is stored.

selector_evidence_confidence_summaries.basis: Public guidance labels and synthetic fixture structure only.

unsupported_manual_handoff_reminders.condition: Any page requiring credentials, MFA, CAPTCHA, payment, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or upload.
unsupported_manual_handoff_reminders.required_response: Stop automation and hand control to the attended user.

fixture_promotion_holds.reason: Synthetic fixture cannot be promoted to a live-observation fixture until independent privacy review passes.

reviewer_routing.routing_reason: Verify read-only scope, redaction completeness, and fixture promotion hold status.

rollback_notes.note: Remove the generated fixture and dependent selector summary if any retained value is later found to be account-scoped or private.
